name: io.github.magnexis/LLM-bridge-mcp-server
title: LLM Bridge MCP Server
description: Approval-gated LLM MCP bridge with persistent contexts, sessions, workflows, repository memory, and controlled development operations.

runtimeArguments.name: --transport
runtimeArguments.description: Optional runtime override for startup mode. Defaults to stdio through environment configuration.

environmentVariables.name: ZAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Provider API key for configured LLM access.

environmentVariables.name: ZAI_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Provider selection. Use zai or openrouter.

environmentVariables.name: GLM_BRIDGE_TRANSPORT_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Bridge transport mode. Use stdio for local hosts or http for remote hosting.

environmentVariables.name: GLM_BRIDGE_REMOTE_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token required when remote bearer or oauth_metadata auth modes are enabled.
